description.value: The extended ritual form of a weave becomes something fundamentally more powerful. The extra preparation time lets you layer the magical structure with a precision that combat casting cannot achieve.

system.benefits:
Your Ritual Casting now also grants one of the following benefits when used, chosen at the time of casting:

  • Extend the duration one step on the duration table at no additional Energy cost
  • Extend the area or range one step at no additional Energy cost
  • Add one additional target at no additional Energy cost

usage.text: Applies whenever you use Ritual Casting
